calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Eun Joo Hong and Maylene Lynch appearing via zoom for Yiyao Zhang.

With respect to the Bancroft and the London property, the Court stated that it does not see how anything is passing from the deceased joint tenant to the surviving joint tenant. Mrs. Hong stated that the properties were purchased with and funded with community funds, that the son has consented, and that it was always their intent to hold it in community property. The petition for spousal property is taken under submission.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Continued To May-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
